mapper.insert: INSERT INTO search_index (entity_type, entity_id, title, description, tags, author_id, last_indexed_at) VALUES (#{entityType}, #{entityId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{tags}, #{authorId}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = VALUES(title), description = VALUES(description), tags = VALUES(tags), author_id = VALUES(author_id), last_indexed_at = NOW()
